---
title: "Customer Segmentation using Machine Learning"
description: "Clustering-based segmentation on large-scale customer data"
date: today
---

## 📌 Problem
Businesses struggle to identify high-value customers for targeted marketing.

## ⚙️ Approach
- Processed large-scale transaction datasets
- Applied K-Means clustering and regression
- Built data pipelines using Python and SQL

## 📊 Results
- Identified key behavioral segments
- Improved marketing efficiency and ROI
- Enabled data-driven decision-making

## 🛠 Tools
Python, Pandas, Scikit-learn, SQL
